articles.author: Sam Bruce
articles.title: UFC Perth takeaways: Prates, Salkilld pad their KO artist reputations - ESPN
articles.description: Statements were made and big steps up were taken at UFC Fight Night from Perth, Western Australia.
articles.content: In the final two fights of an already action-packed UFC Fight Night from Perth, Western Australia, two young athletes with budding reputations to uphold lived up to billing. Both Carlos Prates and Qu… [+6606 chars]
